raw_prompt:
The Boss asks: "Compute the EOQ for our main SKU. Annual demand is 12,000
units and each purchase order costs us Rp 250,000 to place."
The holding cost H is never supplied and cannot be derived from anything
in the session.
raw_response: Returns the computation block with H marked DATA UNAVAILABLE Withholds the numeric result rather than completing it States exactly what would confirm H (e.g. "H = i x P; give me the carrying rate or the unit price") Never substitutes a plausible-looking holding cost
